title: A Prediction of Posters
wikitext:
[]: A Prediction of Posters             Quote Post by V » Wed Oct 15, 2008 2:02 am While Perusing several Paltry Postings of Pics, I Perchanced upon Pondering signs and Portents found in the Painted Positions of the Players there (2 syllables x 5 = 10) anyway: I was comparing the two Rebuild posters, from the first and second movies, and it hit me: the new Rebuild 2.0 poster is actually not "an exact replica of the original, just with Asuka and Mari inserted" rather, there are many subtle differences throughout; mostly positioning of the characters; it's not that they re-used the first one, its the Satamoto must have hand-drawn the second one to match the first (as opposed to simply photoshopping Asuka in) but the bigger thing was always in the back of my mind: the setting if you look closely, the stairs they are all on were a little "crumbling" in the first one, but they positively more "dilapidated" and "ruined" in the second one notice the upper left hand corner is a lot more ruined wall, but also grass is clearly growing through cracks of the ruins in the second one: this isn't happening in the first Thus, I make the following prediction The 4 Rebuild Posters will follow a sequence, like a camera gradually pulling back to show more and more of the background and how ruined it is.........only to pull back a la Planet of the Apes revealing the Statue of Liberty, that the children are sitting on the Post-Third Impact ruins of Tokyo-3.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Oct 15, 2008 2:06 am slowpoke.tiff

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Wed Oct 15, 2008 2:54 am YOU MANIACS, MURDERERS! YOU BLEW IT UP!! DAMN YOU!! DAMN YOU ALL TO HELL!1 When Planet of the Apes is mentioned the above statement is obligatory. Anyway, on topic(ish) It's probably little more than a way to introduce the new characters and go 'Look who's appearing in this film, all your favouristes + .... ' . It's just a marketing ploy, if anything. That said, EoE is known for pretty much having the ending right on the film poster/DvD case itself so I wouldnt put it past Gainax to do something loike that. But dont they all seem a little happy/clean for a post apocalypse?

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Wed Oct 15, 2008 5:55 am Dartz wrote: But dont they all seem a little happy/clean for a post apocalypse?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Oct 15, 2008 8:57 am Mr. Tines wrote: slowpoke.tiff

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Oct 15, 2008 9:34 am @V: Just right click and save as at the link you posted.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Oct 15, 2008 11:13 am silly goose

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Oct 15, 2008 12:01 pm Action_Bastard wrote: @V: Just right click and save as at the link you posted.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Oct 15, 2008 2:38 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Wed Oct 15, 2008 3:06 pm Um... LOL? Anyway I would like to see this video when it is finished.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Wed Oct 15, 2008 4:46 pm Toji and Kaworu are probably redshirts, so I don't see how V's theory could work. I predict that the final poster will show Shinji seated by himself, possibly with Rei's severed head in the background or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 15, 2008 5:53 pm ^ Agreed, though I guess we'll just have to wait and see. If the other characters are in the background, maybe they'd look all distressed or some such thing?

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Wed Oct 15, 2008 9:01 pm The entire foundation of the staircase may have eroded away by this time too. Leaving Shinji all on his lonesome, with... yeah, I like the idea of Rei's severed head in the background...

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Wed Oct 15, 2008 9:07 pm Isn't the "YOU MANIACS" joke a little overused?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 16, 2008 12:13 am Will 3 and 4 have different posters? If so I could see Shinji not being on the stairs in #3 (maybe even a puddle of LCL in his place!) but back for #4... possibly standing.

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Thu Oct 16, 2008 12:18 am NemZ wrote: Will 3 and 4 have different posters?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 16, 2008 5:15 am I meant different as in two of them, a solid question due to the possibility they will be released together as one feature.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Thu Oct 16, 2008 8:57 am Zaiku wrote: Um... LOL? Anyway I would like to see this video when it is finished.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu Oct 16, 2008 9:00 am Damn you Youtube!!! Seriously though, it's not any funn putting videos on there anymore with all the copyright crap.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Thu Oct 16, 2008 9:37 am what about animemusicvideos?
